subcodes.first_line: O ancient companion! All thy detailed letters were received and read with the utmost joy; however, alas [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مونس قدیم مکاتیب مفصله جمیع رسید و در نهایت سرور قرائت گردید ولی افسوس که
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @review of publications, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment
